name: social_services_school_district_s_new_southport_jus_mer
premise: A Social Services response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving social services school district s new southport jus mer. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before regulators arrive. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as justice vs mercy under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Inez Serrano
agents.identity: I am Inez Serrano, accountable for a defensible call in Social Services when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays mercy for justice.

agents.name: Darius Patel
agents.identity: I am Darius Patel, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Social Services.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so mercy isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of justice.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect mercy.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to mercy to secure justice under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before regulators arrive. Evidence is partial. Inez Serrano must decide under justice vs mercy. What does Inez Serrano do?
